summary: P0 Pipeline Resilience Fix Testing - BUILDING_CHARACTER_CONTEXT fallback logic verified. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. _stage_character_context now returns success with fallback continuity instead of failing when LLM call fails. _build_fallback_continuity extracts character names from episode_plan scenes and creates minimal descriptions. Downstream stages (_stage_scene_motion, _stage_keyframes, _stage_scene_clips) gracefully handle fallback continuity with empty visual_tags/color_palette. Frontend: StoryVideoPipeline.js FAILED status shows amber 'Something needs a quick fix' instead of red 'Generation Issue'. Retry is primary CTA with encouraging copy 'This usually works on retry. Your credits have been preserved.' PhotoToComic.js also uses amber styling for FAILED status.

details: _build_fallback_continuity function at lines 858-904 in pipeline.py
Extracts character names from episode_plan.scenes[].characters[]
Deduplicates characters case-insensitively
Checks top-level keys: 'characters', 'cast', 'main_characters'
Creates minimal descriptions: 'A character named {name}'
Returns consistency_level='basic' and empty visual_tags/color_palette
_stage_character_context at lines 801-855 in pipeline.py
Returns success with fallback continuity instead of failing when LLM fails
Sets _fallback=True flag on fallback continuity
Sets universe_id and story_chain_id on continuity package
Logs warning when using fallback: '[PIPELINE] Character continuity LLM failed...'
_stage_scene_motion uses job.get('character_continuity', {}) at line 915
_stage_keyframes uses job.get('character_continuity', {}) at line 934
_stage_scene_clips uses job.get('character_continuity', {}) at line 967
All stages gracefully handle empty/minimal continuity packages

Title changed from 'Generation Issue' to 'Something needs a quick fix'

'Start over with a new story' is ghost secondary button at line 1678

Title: 'Something needs a quick fix'

backend_pipeline_py._build_fallback_continuity: Lines 858-904 - Extracts characters from episode_plan, creates minimal descriptions

frontend_story_video_pipeline_js.STATUS_CONFIG_FAILED: Line 1484 - Amber styling, 'Something needs a quick fix' title

critical_code_review_comments: Backend fallback logic is correctly implemented - _stage_character_context returns success with fallback continuity instead of failing
_build_fallback_continuity correctly extracts characters from scenes and top-level keys
Fallback continuity has all required fields for downstream stages (characters, style_notes, consistency_level)
Downstream stages use .get() with default empty dict to handle missing/minimal continuity
Frontend FAILED status uses amber styling instead of red - less scary for users
Retry is primary CTA with encouraging copy about credits being preserved
Character-specific tip shown when failReason contains 'character'
PhotoToComic.js also updated with softer FAILED status UI
seed_data_creation: None - used code review and unit tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 pipeline resilience fix verified. _stage_character_context at lines 801-855 now returns success with fallback continuity when LLM fails. _build_fallback_continuity at lines 858-904 extracts characters from episode_plan. Frontend FAILED status uses amber styling at line 1484 (StoryVideoPipeline.js) and line 666 (PhotoToComic.js). Retry is primary CTA with encouraging copy. Testing the actual LLM failure path requires mocking - code review verification was the primary test method.
